gates.pass_condition: ZIP opens cleanly and contains one root directory.
Every JSON file parses.
No quarantined diagnostic/provenance path appears in boot instructions.
No provenance-only path appears in boot instructions.
Main agent boot does not load mini-MMMs.
Subagent boot does not load main MMM.
Universal FULL is materially larger than COMPACT.
COMPACT is understandable without FULL.
FULL universal core includes embedded runtime definitions.
definitions/full exists in md and json.
main MMM FULL and COMPACT exist in md and json.
mini-MMM FULL and COMPACT exist for all categories.
Follow-up maps prior wave outputs into lanes/compositions.
🧙🏽‍♂️ Full Wizard max option exists.
Quality/audit score is footer-only.
Audit is not a default output section.
Universal FULL and COMPACT define runtime capability classes and capability-relative route truth.
Simulated route status exists and is not counted as spawned execution.
Runtime adapters exist and are marked as translation layers below Universal Core.
Hybrid Codex-Claude adapter exists and preserves Codex controller / Claude semantic worker split.
Universal Core rejects hard worker counts and sizes waves by evidence need, route value, runtime capacity, marginal payoff, and stop evidence.
Main MMM and mini-MMM boot salience excludes quarantined diagnostic/failure terms while checks/guards retain diagnostic behavior.
